results.title: Pregnancy after sugery and brachytherapy for vaginal cancer.
results.snippet:
PubMed ID: 37408771. 2023/05/31 00:00. BACKGROUND: To examine if pregnancy affects the prognosis of uveal melanoma (UM) 
patients undergoing plaque brachytherapy (PBT) and to assess if PBT has any 
subsequent impact on pregnancy outcomes.
METHODS: A retrospective, single-center study was carried out at Beijing Tongren 
Hospital, focusing on women of childbearing age diagnosed with UM and treated 
with iodine-125 plaque brachytherapy. Both the outcomes of pregnancies and the 
health status of the
